task.summary: There was a DRY violation; I fixed it.
Added a token verification step for each controller to prevent other users from accessing the account
Changed the relationship between the card and account entities
Added check of unique email in entity User
Added response types for different types of exceptions
Change url in js files and seperated front and back
Changed redirect url for frontend. Also added exceptionHandling in SecurityConfig

MESSAGE.value: There was a DRY violation; I fixed it.
Added a token verification step for each controller to prevent other users from accessing the account
Changed the relationship between the card and account entities
Added check of unique email in entity User
Added response types for different types of exceptions
Change url in js files and seperated front and back
Changed redirect url for frontend. Also added exceptionHandling in SecurityConfig
